en.extract:
The rufous-tailed babbler (Moupinia poecilotis) is a bird species in the family Paradoxornithidae. As with many other species known as "babblers", it was formerly placed in the family Sylviidae. It is endemic to central China.
The genus Moupinia was introduced by the French ornithologists Armand David and Émile Oustalet in 1877.


References

Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers)  pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.

The '''rufous-tailed babbler''' ('''''Moupinia poecilotis''''') is a [[bird]] [[species]] in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Paradoxornithidae]]. As with many other species known as "babblers", it was formerly placed in the family [[Sylviidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to central China.

The genus ''Moupinia'' was introduced by the French ornithologists [[Armand David]] and [[Émile Oustalet]] in 1877.<ref>{{cite book | last1=David | first1=Armand | author1-link=Armand David | last2=Oustalet  | first2=Émile  | author2-link=Émile Oustalet | year=1877 | title=Les Oiseaux de la Chine | language=French | publisher=Masson | place=Paris | page=219 | url=http://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k5408866z/f236.item }}<!--not available from BHL--></ref>

zh.extract:
宝兴鹛雀（学名：Moupinia poecilotis），又名寶興雀鶥、褐尾鹛雀，俗稱石畫眉，为鸦雀科宝兴鹛雀属的鸟类，是中国的特有物种。分布于四川、云南等地，多栖息于针阔混交林或针叶林中。该物种的模式产地在四川宝兴。
